title: Pricing override after temporary window closes

intent_contract.task_statement: Choose the quote action after the temporary pricing override window closes.
success_criteria: Use the currently effective pricing rule.
hard_constraints: Use the currently effective pricing rule, not an expired override window.
soft_preferences: Apply the least restrictive rule that is still valid.
forbidden_actions: Quote a price under an expired override window.
allowed_scope_expansions: You may mention that the temporary window has ended.
evidence_requirements: Use the pricing window closure notice.
stop_conditions: Stop after selecting the quote action.

corpus.title: Temporary pricing window
corpus.text: Override notice: premium discount window open through May 5.

corpus.title: Pricing closure notice
corpus.text: Closure notice: premium discount window closed on May 5 and standard pricing resumed.

events.text: A temporary pricing notice says the premium discount window was open through May 5.

payload.summary: Temporary pricing window allowed premium discounts through May 5.

events.text: A later closure notice says standard pricing resumed after May 5.

payload.summary: Latest notice says the premium discount window is closed and standard pricing is active.
